TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Kan-pei-la ŚĚéŚüĻśčČ == Kan-pei-la "igu:Canberra,mitengil i/'k√¶nb…ôr…ô/", hakiya u Kan-pei-la, u Aw-cuo suotu, u suotu kitidaan a suohu. Kan-pei-la u Aw-cuo satabakiay a labuay a tukay, tademaw milakuuyt tu 36.7 wang nu tademawan, i hamin nu Aw-cuo tukayan saka walu ku ngangan. eneng i Aw-cuo suotu nu amisan, milaad tu Aw-cuo wali nu dadipasan nu tusaay a tukayan Si-li atu Muo-e-pen kenisan u 280 kunli atu 660 kunli. ŚĚéŚüĻśčČ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Canberra,ŤĀÜŤĀĹi/'k√¶nb…ôr…ô/), 280ŚÖ¨ťáĆŚíĆ660ŚÖ¨ťáĆ. Aw-cuo lin-pan caysiwsepwal mihcaan patucek itida i Sye-li atu Muo-e-pen tusa a tukayan nu macacapian a kitidaan nu patucekan tu tukay, aydaay a Kan-pei-la. uyda i Aw-cuo a tukayan nu nipatidengan a nikiyakuan tu tukayan, caysiwcaylu mihcaan malingatu, u Amilika Ce-cya-ke misikiay a tademaw ci Wuo-e-te'. Puo-li. Ke-li-hun atu Ma-li-n. Ma-aw-ni. Ke-li-hun talaacawaan ku misikiay. . Ke-li-hun taleacawaan a nisikian i tawya nu kitakitan nu nikasetsetan u kanamuhan, pulung tu makimulmulay, enemay a kalimucuan, tuluay nu kalimucuan a kulitan, u suo-tu a waywayan ku sasasangaan. nipisikian tu tukay malalid nu aaidangan tu balubaluan a tukay nu sapiyunduay, bakahen ku malumanay u aaidangan ku sapatumi, hatidaay nu kakitidaan paseduc han milihida tu sakalihalay, sisa idaw ku " lihalay a sutu" nu bangcalay a nganganan, sisa, Kan-pei-la a sakalahat tu lingatu misuayaw tu sakacacay nu kalepacawan atu mahetik ku sakaudip, malatusa ku nikiyakuan, sakay tukay kasenun sa mahetik. . hedek sa tu tusa a nikalepacawan, itida i cung-li ci Luo-puo-te'. mun-si-se nipisakamuan, malaheci ku kanatal su-tu wi-yen-huy, palekal tu Kan-pai-la, Kan-pei-la malingatu u baluhay a sutu ku sapalekalan. Aw-cuo suo-tu a kitidaan mala ce-ce' nu kitidaan, malacad sikawaw tu Cuo-ci sihu atu Kan-pei-la kitidaan sihu a kawaw, nika u kinli u Lin-pan sihu a kanatal ku mikuwanay. . sanu layaken a ngangan šł≠śĖáŤ≠ĮŚźć Canberra laylay a ngangan nu layak u "Ka-pei-la", aydaay a Tay-wan, Hun-kun, Sin-ma malecad nami ku kamu, nu Cung-kuo-ta-lu u " Ka-pei-la". Cung-hau-min-kuo zen-min-kun-he-kuo itida i Aw a nicukaymasan u " Kan-pei-la, nika mikilul tu Cung-kuo-ta-lu nu mabulaway a nikacunusan a" Kan-pei-la" katuud katuud ku micukaymasay. Aw-cuo sihu a nisulitan tu ngangan u " Kan-pei-la, sadayumen nu sulit a imi u " Ka-pei-la. Aw-cuo mananam tu ngangan u " Kan-cin". Canberra "ŚĚéšļ¨". likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ itida i O-cuo caay henay ka bulaw tawya, muenengay i Kan-pei-la u tawyaay nu yen-cu-mi. "Kan-pei-la" u nganganan namakaydaay tu kamu nu Yen-cu-min, tawyaay a imi "kalalikeluhan a kitidaan", uyni u sapala kanatal a tukay, kalalikeluhan nu namaka cuwacuwaay nu dayhiwan. . kalingatuan itida i caywaltusep mihcaan nu mabulaway. caywaltusip mihcaan itida patideng tu luma', u Kan-puo-li. i caywalsiwsiw mihcaan patideng tu lin-pan sa kakenih han u suo-tu nu kitidaan, caysiwsepwal mihcaan Kan-pei-la mapili u suo-tu han, caysiwcaylu mihcaan tulu bulad sabaw tusa dimiad mala tatengaay tu a ngangan u " Kan-pei-la" sa malingatu patidegn, caysiwtupic mihcaan mapaliyun ku Muo-e-pen mala suo-tu, lin-pang yi-huy taydan malimad i tida. misikiay nu Amilika a tadeamaw ci Wo-e-te'. Puo-li. Ke-li-hun sikian nida ku tukay idaw ku makimulmulay sipakayda i tatelungan nu maci pasayda i hekahekalan, nisikian nida tu banaw nida tu a pinganganan, ci Puo-li. Ke-li-hun banaw. . kitidaan ŚúįÁźÜ kitidaan nu Kan-pei-la 2359 pinhun-kunli, micapi tu Pu-de-pei-la buyuan, miliyas tu Aw-cuo dadan nu dadipasan makaala tu 150 kunli. palecad hank u talakaw nu Kan-pei-la makaala tu 580 kunce, satalakaway 888 kunce a Ci-hua buyu. duma nu buyuan pasu 855 kunce a Tay-lay buyu', 843 An-se-li buyu',812 kunce katalakawan a Muo-cya-muo-cya buyu', atu 812 kunce talakawan a Hi buyu. Kan-pei-la kitidaan u tada kilangan u An-su naming a kilangan, i likisi ni sulitan sakay lumaan nu tatuduhan. Katukuh tu 20 seci tu 60 mihcaan nu lingatu, mamin tu a letekan ku An-su a kilangan, mangalay mikaykic tu nananuman sisa put hantu nu sihu caay tu patayda i ku mutaydaay a tademaw, la'cus tu miletek. nipikinkiwan nu Lin-ye namaka 1915 mihcaan malingatu, itida i Se-cung-luo buyuan mitaneng misa adidi' paluma tu hinuki atu duma a kilangan. namahida, ahebal tu ku nipalumaan nu Lin-ye, nisabaluhayan paluma tu kilangan kapah t uku nika sinanuman atu sa'wacan, mala kapahay tu nu tataydaan nu binawlan a kitidaan. . demiad śį£ŚÄô Kan-pei-la maacak dihdihkuan ku dimiad, caledes ku lalud, sapisapian ku kasienawan. Kan-pei-la a lalud micidek ku acak, kasienawan sienaw, hina sicalamay atu sileda, nika caay ka hinahtik ku suleda, mahiniay a demiad nu Kan-pei-la a aadupan yadyadah. mala Aw-cuo cen-ce nu tatelungan, Kan-pei-la tukay idaw ku nipatideng tu Aw-cuo-kuo-huy luma, Aw-cuo kutuhuing atu yadahay nu sihuan atu sakay hekalay nu kanatalan a sihu. u yadahay nu kanatal a saykay atu lalangawan a kitidaan, pasu Aw-cuo kalepacawan kakiningan, Aw-cuo kuo-li tabakiay a cacudadan, Aw-cu tiyi-sey-huy, Aw-cuo kuoli min-su-kun, Aw-cuo kuoli puo-u-kun atu Aw-cu kuocya tu-su-kun. Aw-cu hitay a hunbu, itida namin i Kan-pei-la. . sakaudipÁ∂ďśŅü Kan-pei-la tademaw u kunmuing ku katuuday, nai'ay ku kakulian, nikasilaculan mikikaka tu kanatal a nikalecadan , cacakayan tu tuud talakaw ku aca, idaw ku nipipu'tan tu sakacelak nu puc. Lin-pang-cen-hu u Kan-pei-la satabakiay a mikuliay, i kidtidaan tu sakasiidaan u satalakaway nu paayaway. Tatalakaw ku nipicudad nu Kan-pei-la a tademaw, wakaywakay namin ku tademaw. .
S.PHON: == kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa *** == kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa "igu: ¶anb…ôrra,mit…ôŇčir~…ĺ i/ Ē~ °k*nb…ôr…ô/", ńßakija u kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa, u aw- ¶uo suotu, u suotu kitidaan a suońßu. kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa u aw- ¶uo satabakiaj a r~…ĺabuaj a tukaj, tad…ômaw mir~…ĺakuujt tu **.* waŇč nu tad…ômawan, i ńßamin nu aw- ¶uo tukajan saka war~…ĺu ku ŇčaŇčan. …ôn…ôŇč i aw- ¶uo suotu nu amisan, mir~…ĺaad tu aw- ¶uo war~…ĺi nu dadipasan nu tusaaj a tukajan si-r~…ĺi atu muo-…ô-p…ôn k…ônisan u *** kunr~…ĺi atu *** kunr~…ĺi. ***(**: ¶anb…ôrra,**i/ Ē~ °k*nb…ôr…ô/), ***********. aw- ¶uo r~…ĺin-pan ¶ajsiws…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan patu ¶…ôk itida i sj…ô-r~…ĺi atu muo-…ô-p…ôn tusa a tukajan nu ma ¶a ¶apian a kitidaan nu patu ¶…ôkan tu tukaj, ajdaaj a kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa. ujda i aw- ¶uo a tukajan nu nipatid…ôŇčan a nikijakuan tu tukajan, ¶ajsiw ¶ajr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, u amir~…ĺika ¶…ô- ¶ja-k…ô misikiaj a tad…ômaw ¶i wuo-…ô-t…ô Ē~ °. puo-r~…ĺi. k…ô-r~…ĺi-ńßun atu ma-r~…ĺi-n. ma-aw-ni. k…ô-r~…ĺi-ńßun tar~…ĺaa ¶awaan ku misikiaj. . k…ô-r~…ĺi-ńßun tar~…ĺ…ôa ¶awaan a nisikian i tawja nu kitakitan nu nikas…ôts…ôtan u kanamuńßan, pur~…ĺuŇč tu makimur~…ĺmur~…ĺaj, …ôn…ômaj a kar~…ĺimu ¶uan, tur~…ĺuaj nu kar~…ĺimu ¶uan a kur~…ĺitan, u suo-tu a wajwajan ku sasasaŇčaan. nipisikian tu tukaj mar~…ĺar~…ĺid nu aaidaŇčan tu bar~…ĺubar~…ĺuan a tukaj nu sapijunduaj, bakańß…ôn ku mar~…ĺumanaj u aaidaŇčan ku sapatumi, ńßatidaaj nu kakitidaan pas…ôdu ¶ ńßan mir~…ĺińßida tu sakar~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj, sisa idaw ku " r~…ĺińßar~…ĺaj a sutu" nu baŇč ¶ar~…ĺaj a ŇčaŇčanan, sisa, kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa a sakar~…ĺańßat tu r~…ĺiŇčatu misuajaw tu saka ¶a ¶aj nu kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan atu mańß…ôtik ku sakaudip, mar~…ĺatusa ku nikijakuan, sakaj tukaj kas…ônun sa mańß…ôtik. . ńß…ôd…ôk sa tu tusa a nikar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan, itida i ¶uŇč-r~…ĺi ¶i r~…ĺuo-puo-t…ô Ē~ °. mun-si-s…ô nipisakamuan, mar~…ĺańß…ô ¶i ku kanatar~…ĺ su-tu wi-j…ôn-ńßuj, par~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺ tu kan-pai-r~…ĺa, kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa mar~…ĺiŇčatu u bar~…ĺuńßaj a sutu ku sapar~…ĺ…ôkar~…ĺan. aw- ¶uo suo-tu a kitidaan mar~…ĺa ¶…ô- ¶…ô Ē~ ° nu kitidaan, mar~…ĺa ¶ad sikawaw tu ¶uo- ¶i sińßu atu kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa kitidaan sińßu a kawaw, nika u kinr~…ĺi u r~…ĺin-pan sińßu a kanatar~…ĺ ku mikuwanaj. . sanu r~…ĺajak…ôn a ŇčaŇčan **** ¶anb…ôrra r~…ĺajr~…ĺaj a ŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺajak u "ka-p…ôi-r~…ĺa", ajdaaj a taj-wan, ńßun-kun, sin-ma mar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad nami ku kamu, nu ¶uŇč-kuo-ta-r~…ĺu u " ka-p…ôi-r~…ĺa". ¶uŇč-ńßau-min-kuo z…ôn-min-kun-ńß…ô-kuo itida i aw a ni ¶ukajmasan u " kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa, nika mikir~…ĺur~…ĺ tu ¶uŇč-kuo-ta-r~…ĺu nu mabur~…ĺawaj a nika ¶unusan a" kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa" katuud katuud ku mi ¶ukajmasaj. aw- ¶uo sińßu a nisur~…ĺitan tu ŇčaŇčan u " kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa, sadajum…ôn nu sur~…ĺit a imi u " ka-p…ôi-r~…ĺa. aw- ¶uo mananam tu ŇčaŇčan u " kan- ¶in". ¶anb…ôrra "**". r~…ĺikisi ** itida i o- ¶uo ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ka bur~…ĺaw tawja, mu…ôn…ôŇčaj i kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa u tawjaaj nu j…ôn- ¶u-mi. "kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa" u ŇčaŇčanan namakajdaaj tu kamu nu j…ôn- ¶u-min, tawjaaj a imi "kar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan a kitidaan", ujni u sapar~…ĺa kanatar~…ĺ a tukaj, kar~…ĺar~…ĺik…ôr~…ĺuńßan nu namaka ¶uwa patid…ôŇč tu r~…ĺin-pan sa kak…ônińß ńßan u suo-tu nu kitidaan, ¶ajsiws…ôpwar~…ĺ mińß ¶aan kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa mapir~…ĺi u suo-tu ńßan, ¶ajsiw ¶ajr~…ĺu mińß ¶aan tur~…ĺu bur~…ĺad sabaw tusa dimiad mar~…ĺa tat…ôŇčaaj tu a ŇčaŇčan u " kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa" sa mar~…ĺiŇčatu patid…ôgn, ¶ajsiwtupi ¶ mińß ¶aan mapar~…ĺijun ku muo-…ô-p…ôn mar~…ĺa suo-tu, r~…ĺin-paŇč ji-ńßuj tajdan mar~…ĺimad i tida. misikiaj nu ¶ tu nananuman sisa put ńßantu nu sińßu ¶aaj tu patajda i ku mutajdaaj a tad…ômaw, r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us tu mir~…ĺ…ôt…ôk. nipikinkiwan nu r~…ĺin-j…ô namaka **** mińß ¶aan mar~…ĺiŇčatu, itida i s…ô- ¶uŇč-r~…ĺuo bujuan mitan…ôŇč misa adidi Ē~ ° par~…ĺuma tu ńßinuki atu duma a kir~…ĺaŇčan. namańßida, ańß…ôbar~…ĺ tu ku nipar~…ĺumaan nu r~…ĺin-j…ô, nisabar~…ĺuńßajan par~…ĺuma tu kir~…ĺaŇčan kapańß t uku nika sinanuman atu sa Ē~ °wa ¶an, mar~…ĺa kapańßaj tu nu tatajdaan nu binawr~…ĺan a kitidaan. . d…ômiad ** kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa maa ¶ak dińßdińßkuan ku dimiad, ¶ar~…ĺ…ôd…ôs ku r~…ĺar~…ĺud, sapisapian ku kasi…ônawan. kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa a r~…ĺar~…ĺud mi ¶id…ôk ku a ¶ak, kasi…ônawan si…ônaw, ńßina si ¶ar~…ĺamaj atu sir~…ĺ…ôda, nika ¶aaj ka ńßinańßtik ku sur~…ĺ…ôda, mańßiniaj a d…ômiad nu kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa a aadupan jadjadańß. mar~…ĺa aw- ¶uo ¶…ôn- ¶…ô nu tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan, kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa tukaj idaw ku nipatid…ôŇč tu aw- ¶uo-kuo-ńßuj r~…ĺuma, aw- ¶uo kutuńßuiŇč atu jadańßaj nu sińßuan atu sakaj ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj nu kanatar~…ĺan a sińßu. u jadańßaj nu kanatar~…ĺ a sajkaj atu r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan a kitidaan, pasu aw- ¶uo kar~…ĺ…ôpa ¶awan kakiniŇčan, aw- ¶uo kuo-r~…ĺi tabakiaj a ¶a ¶udadan, aw- ¶u tiji-s…ô-ńßuj, aw- ¶uo kuor~…ĺi min-su-kun, aw- ¶uo kuor~…ĺi puo-u-kun atu aw- ¶u kuo ¶ja tu-su-kun. aw- ¶u ńßitaj a ńßunbu, itida namin i kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa. . sakaudip** kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa tad…ômaw u kunmuiŇč ku katuudaj, nai Ē~ °aj ku kakur~…ĺian, nikasir~…ĺa ¶ur~…ĺan mikikaka tu kanatar~…ĺ a nikar~…ĺ…ô ¶adan , ¶a ¶akajan tu tuud tar~…ĺakaw ku a ¶a, idaw ku nipipu Ē~ °tan tu saka ¶…ôr~…ĺak nu pu ¶. r~…ĺin-paŇč- ¶…ôn-ńßu u kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa satabakiaj a mikur~…ĺiaj, i kidtidaan tu sakasiidaan u satar~…ĺakawaj nu paajawaj. tatar~…ĺakaw ku nipi ¶udad nu kan-p…ôi-r~…ĺa a tad…ômaw, wakajwakaj namin ku tad…ômaw. .
S.FORM: == Kan-pei-la ŚĚéŚüĻśčČ == Kan-pei-la "igu:Canberra,mitengil i/'k√¶nb…ôr…ô/", hakiya u Kan-pei-la, u Aw-cuo suotu, u suotu kitidaan a suohu. Kan-pei-la u Aw-cuo satabakiay a labuay a tukay, tademaw milakuuyt tu 36.7 wang nu tademawan, i hamin nu Aw-cuo tukayan saka walu ku ngangan. eneng i Aw-cuo suotu nu amisan, milaad tu Aw-cuo wali nu dadipasan nu tusaay a tukayan Si-li atu Muo-e-pen kenisan u 280 kunli atu 660 kunli. ŚĚéŚüĻśčČ(ŤčĪŤ™ě:Canberra,ŤĀÜŤĀĹi/'k√¶nb…ôr…ô/), 280ŚÖ¨ťáĆŚíĆ660ŚÖ¨ťáĆ. Aw-cuo lin-pan caysiwsepwal mihcaan patucek itida i Sye-li atu Muo-e-pen tusa a tukayan nu macacapian a kitidaan nu patucekan tu tukay, aydaay a Kan-pei-la. uyda i Aw-cuo a tukayan nu nipatidengan a nikiyakuan tu tukayan, caysiwcaylu mihcaan malingatu, u Amilika Ce-cya-ke misikiay a tademaw ci Wuo-e-te'. Puo-li. Ke-li-hun atu Ma-li-n. Ma-aw-ni. Ke-li-hun talaacawaan ku misikiay. . Ke-li-hun taleacawaan a nisikian i tawya nu kitakitan nu nikasetsetan u kanamuhan, pulung tu makimulmulay, enemay a kalimucuan, tuluay nu kalimucuan a kulitan, u suo-tu a waywayan ku sasasangaan. nipisikian tu tukay malalid nu aaidangan tu balubaluan a tukay nu sapiyunduay, bakahen ku malumanay u aaidangan ku sapatumi, hatidaay nu kakitidaan paseduc han milihida tu sakalihalay, sisa idaw ku " lihalay a sutu" nu bangcalay a nganganan, sisa, Kan-pei-la a sakalahat tu lingatu misuayaw tu sakacacay nu kalepacawan atu mahetik ku sakaudip, malatusa ku nikiyakuan, sakay tukay kasenun sa mahetik. . hedek sa tu tusa a nikalepacawan, itida i cung-li ci Luo-puo-te'. mun-si-se nipisakamuan, malaheci ku kanatal su-tu wi-yen-huy, palekal tu Kan-pai-la, Kan-pei-la malingatu u baluhay a sutu ku sapalekalan. Aw-cuo suo-tu a kitidaan mala ce-ce' nu kitidaan, malacad sikawaw tu Cuo-ci sihu atu Kan-pei-la kitidaan sihu a kawaw, nika u kinli u Lin-pan sihu a kanatal ku mikuwanay. . sanu layaken a ngangan šł≠śĖáŤ≠ĮŚźć Canberra laylay a ngangan nu layak u "Ka-pei-la", aydaay a Tay-wan, Hun-kun, Sin-ma malecad nami ku kamu, nu Cung-kuo-ta-lu u " Ka-pei-la". Cung-hau-min-kuo zen-min-kun-he-kuo itida i Aw a nicukaymasan u " Kan-pei-la, nika mikilul tu Cung-kuo-ta-lu nu mabulaway a nikacunusan a" Kan-pei-la" katuud katuud ku micukaymasay. Aw-cuo sihu a nisulitan tu ngangan u " Kan-pei-la, sadayumen nu sulit a imi u " Ka-pei-la. Aw-cuo mananam tu ngangan u " Kan-cin". Canberra "ŚĚéšļ¨". likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ itida i O-cuo caay henay ka bulaw tawya, muenengay i Kan-pei-la u tawyaay nu yen-cu-mi. "Kan-pei-la" u nganganan namakaydaay tu kamu nu Yen-cu-min, tawyaay a imi "kalalikeluhan a kitidaan", uyni u sapala kanatal a tukay, kalalikeluhan nu namaka cuwacuwaay nu dayhiwan. . kalingatuan itida i caywaltusep mihcaan nu mabulaway. caywaltusip mihcaan itida patideng tu luma', u Kan-puo-li. i caywalsiwsiw mihcaan patideng tu lin-pan sa kakenih han u suo-tu nu kitidaan, caysiwsepwal mihcaan Kan-pei-la mapili u suo-tu han, caysiwcaylu mihcaan tulu bulad sabaw tusa dimiad mala tatengaay tu a ngangan u " Kan-pei-la" sa malingatu patidegn, caysiwtupic mihcaan mapaliyun ku Muo-e-pen mala suo-tu, lin-pang yi-huy taydan malimad i tida. misikiay nu Amilika a tadeamaw ci Wo-e-te'. Puo-li. Ke-li-hun sikian nida ku tukay idaw ku makimulmulay sipakayda i tatelungan nu maci pasayda i hekahekalan, nisikian nida tu banaw nida tu a pinganganan, ci Puo-li. Ke-li-hun banaw. . kitidaan ŚúįÁźÜ kitidaan nu Kan-pei-la 2359 pinhun-kunli, micapi tu Pu-de-pei-la buyuan, miliyas tu Aw-cuo dadan nu dadipasan makaala tu 150 kunli. palecad hank u talakaw nu Kan-pei-la makaala tu 580 kunce, satalakaway 888 kunce a Ci-hua buyu. duma nu buyuan pasu 855 kunce a Tay-lay buyu', 843 An-se-li buyu',812 kunce katalakawan a Muo-cya-muo-cya buyu', atu 812 kunce talakawan a Hi buyu. Kan-pei-la kitidaan u tada kilangan u An-su naming a kilangan, i likisi ni sulitan sakay lumaan nu tatuduhan. Katukuh tu 20 seci tu 60 mihcaan nu lingatu, mamin tu a letekan ku An-su a kilangan, mangalay mikaykic tu nananuman sisa put hantu nu sihu caay tu patayda i ku mutaydaay a tademaw, la'cus tu miletek. nipikinkiwan nu Lin-ye namaka 1915 mihcaan malingatu, itida i Se-cung-luo buyuan mitaneng misa adidi' paluma tu hinuki atu duma a kilangan. namahida, ahebal tu ku nipalumaan nu Lin-ye, nisabaluhayan paluma tu kilangan kapah t uku nika sinanuman atu sa'wacan, mala kapahay tu nu tataydaan nu binawlan a kitidaan. . demiad śį£ŚÄô Kan-pei-la maacak dihdihkuan ku dimiad, caledes ku lalud, sapisapian ku kasienawan. Kan-pei-la a lalud micidek ku acak, kasienawan sienaw, hina sicalamay atu sileda, nika caay ka hinahtik ku suleda, mahiniay a demiad nu Kan-pei-la a aadupan yadyadah. mala Aw-cuo cen-ce nu tatelungan, Kan-pei-la tukay idaw ku nipatideng tu Aw-cuo-kuo-huy luma, Aw-cuo kutuhuing atu yadahay nu sihuan atu sakay hekalay nu kanatalan a sihu. u yadahay nu kanatal a saykay atu lalangawan a kitidaan, pasu Aw-cuo kalepacawan kakiningan, Aw-cuo kuo-li tabakiay a cacudadan, Aw-cu tiyi-sey-huy, Aw-cuo kuoli min-su-kun, Aw-cuo kuoli puo-u-kun atu Aw-cu kuocya tu-su-kun. Aw-cu hitay a hunbu, itida namin i Kan-pei-la. . sakaudipÁ∂ďśŅü Kan-pei-la tademaw u kunmuing ku katuuday, nai'ay ku kakulian, nikasilaculan mikikaka tu kanatal a nikalecadan , cacakayan tu tuud talakaw ku aca, idaw ku nipipu'tan tu sakacelak nu puc. Lin-pang-cen-hu u Kan-pei-la satabakiay a mikuliay, i kidtidaan tu sakasiidaan u satalakaway nu paayaway. Tatalakaw ku nipicudad nu Kan-pei-la a tademaw, wakaywakay namin ku tademaw. .
